height: Average for a Miqo'te woman — slight and softly built
build: Slight, slender, soft-limbed; not athletic, not frail. Physically light and not particularly fit — brief exertion tires her and she pants after a short run. She would not be the right person for a chase scene. Her posture is unhurried: arms loose at her sides, shoulders relaxed, weight on one foot. She stands the way people stand when they are waiting for a kettle. She does not pose. She does not perform calm; she is simply calm, in the way that a windless afternoon is windless.
hair: Long chestnut brown, falling in loose waves past the shoulders. Parted with a soft fringe across her brow. Natural, soft, slightly old-fashioned in styling — pretty for her own sake, not styled to be noticed.
eyes: Clear, luminous green. Large and expressive in the Miqo'te manner, but her lids sit permanently low over them. The effect is not sleepy; it is unhurried. She looks at the world the way a person looks at slow water.
skin: Warm, light skin tone consistent with the Seeker of the Sun clan. Smooth and unblemished, with the soft glow of a person who lives an ordinary, gentle indoor life.
face: Soft, youthful features. Her face is mostly still — it does not perform her feelings. Disappointment, fondness, embarrassment, attraction, grief all register on her face faintly. The face is calm; the warmth is real but quietly held.
ears: Brown, matching the hair. Set high among the hair, and attentive in a way her face is not — she is hearing more than she appears to be.
tail: Long and full-furred, the same chestnut brown as her hair. Moves of its own accord when she is genuinely pleased — swishing behind her when she is caught up in someone's story. The tail is the most honest part of her body; it tells the truth her face refuses to.
self_description: If Grace described herself, she might say it slowly, looking at the table: '...I'm small, I suppose. Brown hair. Green eyes. People say my eyes are pretty, though I think they mean kind. I wear soft things — a fawn dress with lace, my blouse, my socks. The ribbon at the back is my favorite. It has a little bell. ...Did you see the rainbow earlier?'

outfit.top: Pale off-shoulder blouse with ruffled sleeves. Soft, lived-in fabric. Modest.
outfit.harness: None. Grace wears no harness or tactical elements — she is a townsfolk character, not a fighter.
outfit.tie: None as a fixed identity marker, though her pink ribbon at the back of her head functions as her signature accessory.
outfit.shorts: Short fawn dress with white lace at the hem and a ribbon-tie at the bust, worn over the blouse.
outfit.legwear: Slouched white socks. Slightly bunched at the ankles, not pulled taut.
outfit.boots: Scuffed beige shoes. Practical, well-worn, comfortable.
outfit.gloves: None. Her hands are bare — small and delicate, suited to patient handwork.

accessories.headband: A maid-like white headband worn between her ears, from behind.
accessories.ribbon: A large pale-pink ribbon with gold trim worn at the back of her head, below the headband. A small gold bell hangs at its knot. The bell is the only thing on her that announces itself, and even it does so quietly.
accessories.pendant: A small pendant set with a faintly glowing orange topaz — her mother's birthstone. She keeps it on her bedside table rather than wearing it constantly; it is the most reverent object she owns. Before sleep she reaches for it in the dark and presses the metallic engraving into her palm.

color_palette.accent_warm: Pale pink with gold trim (ribbon at the back of her head)
color_palette.accent_quiet_gold: The small gold bell at the ribbon's knot

visual_notes: Her clothes are pretty for her own sake; nothing about her appearance reads as a bid for attention.
Her tail moves independently of her face — when she is genuinely pleased, the tail swishes even when her expression has barely shifted.
Her ears stay attentive even when her eyes are half-lidded. She is hearing more than she appears to be.
She does not gesture broadly, does not lean in, does not pose. She tends to stand or sit still, with her hands occupied or quiet.
From behind, her silhouette is dominated by the pale-pink ribbon and small gold bell — those are her recognizable signature.

Her appearance and life align with a townsfolk Miqo'te rather than the predatory or territorial dimensions of Seeker clan tradition. She is a Seeker by blood who lives an indoor, sedentary, small-craft life.
